description: A control case study of a REAL high-volume Polymarket trader (0x006cc834cc092684f1b56626e23bedb3835c16ea) with 2,523 directional trades across 389 markets. Win rate: 39.3%, Volume: $27.9M. Verdict: Low (p=1.00). This wallet serves as a baseline to validate that WalletStory's detection methodology does NOT produce false positives for legitimate traders. Unlike the Theo cluster (97.3% win rate, Critical verdict), this trader's performance is statistically indistinguishable from random chance, demonstrating normal market participation without insider information.

addresses.notes: Win rate: 39.3%, Volume: $27.9M, 2,523 directional trades, 389 unique markets. Low verdict (p=1.00) confirms no insider trading signal.

market_context.diversification: Extremely well-diversified across sports, politics, crypto, entertainment, and current events

control_vs_theo.interpretation: The control case demonstrates that our methodology correctly distinguishes between baseline trading (39% win rate, no edge) and insider trading (97% win rate, overwhelming edge). A 39% win rate is actually BELOW the expected 50% baseline, indicating this trader is either unlucky or still learning. This is the opposite of the Theo cluster, which shows superhuman accuracy only explainable by MNPI.

control_case_purpose.validate_no_false_positives: Ensures pipeline does not flag legitimate traders as Critical insiders
control_case_purpose.establish_baseline: 39% win rate represents typical retail trader (below 50% baseline)
control_case_purpose.demonstrate_sensitivity: Shows pipeline can detect difference between 'average trader' (Low) and 'insider trader' (Critical)
control_case_purpose.benchmark_for_verdicts: Low verdict (p=1.00) = no edge, Critical verdict (p<1e-10) = insider info

why_this_wallet_works.real_data: All statistics derived from actual Polymarket Data API, verifiable on Polygonscan
why_this_wallet_works.high_volume: $27.9M volume demonstrates this is an active, serious trader (not a test account)
why_this_wallet_works.diversified: 389 unique markets shows broad participation, not targeted insider trading
why_this_wallet_works.below_baseline: 39.3% win rate is actually worse than coin-flip odds, confirming no MNPI
why_this_wallet_works.opposite_of_theo: Theo: 97% win rate, 15 markets, $15M volume. Control: 39% win rate, 389 markets, $27M volume.

notes.data_source: Polymarket Data API (live fetch from blockchain data, April 23 2026)
notes.credibility: All numbers can be independently verified by running the same pipeline on this address

trade_pattern_differences.control: 2,523 trades across 389 markets (6.5 avg per market) = hyper-diversified retail trader
trade_pattern_differences.theo: 12,000 trades across 15 markets (800 avg per market) = concentrated insider targeting

volume_pattern_differences.control: $27.9M total volume but 39% win rate = net loser, typical retail behavior
volume_pattern_differences.theo: $15.4M total volume but 97% win rate = net profit ~$10M+, insider-level accuracy

verdict_thresholds.Low: p >= 0.05 (no significant edge) ← CONTROL CASE HERE
verdict_thresholds.Critical: p < 1e-10 (overwhelming evidence, almost certainly MNPI) ← THEO HERE
